title: Agent Platform embedded LLM proxy config
description: Configuration for the slim OpenAI-compatible proxy (Ollama, LM Studio, Gemini). Use with config.yaml; editors can associate this schema for validation.

provider.description: Default backend when the client omits model or uses an unlisted raw id.

model.description: Default backend model id for the default provider.

providers.description: Named backends and the client-visible model routes under each.

name.description: Upstream provider for all models in this block.

models.description: Routes exposed as OpenAI model ids. Use a string when alias and backend id are the same; use an object when the client alias differs from the upstream model name.

oneOf.description: Client model id and backend model id are identical.

model_name.description: Value sent as model in client requests (alias).

model.description: Backend model id passed to the provider API.

model_list.description: Optional flat list of model entries. Prefer the providers block for new configs.
